programmes.show_description: Rollins and Fin investigate an assault in Kentucky that has striking similarities to that of a victim found in Central Park. Benson receives intel that turns the case upside down.
After NCIS learns that the owner of Parker's favourite bakery is being blackmailed, they hatch a plan to save her from the perpetrators.
When tragedy strikes the family of a prominent judge, Brady must determine if the murder is connected to any of her rulings. Baxter steps in when a key witness refuses to testify.
After leading police on a slow pursuit, a sharply-dressed driver has a heated talk with another deputy. In spite of her tears, police unravel a woman's lies one-by-one.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Ideal World Shopping - For All Your Shopping Needs
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Enemies Foreign: US crime drama series. The team has to protect Ziva's father when he attends the NCIS conference. Ziva confronts her past.
Enemies Domestic: US crime drama series. After an ambush changes the course of their investigation, the NCIS team has to find answers quickly.
False Witness: US crime drama. This week, the team search for a key witness in a murder trial who has been scared off giving evidence after receiving a threat at the safe house.
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Patient Zero: Drama series about cops and lawyers. Detectives are puzzled when they discover the victim of a lethal carjacking was carrying a vial of the SARS virus.
Shrunk: Powerful American drama series about cops and lawyers. An aspiring actress is found stabbed to death in the apartment of a famous songwriter.
Blaze: Police drama series. Cops investigate a blaze at an overcrowded gig in which 23 people died. Briscoe and Green suspect the band's lead singer is responsible.
Evil Breeds: Legal drama series. When an elderly woman is found murdered in her apartment, suspects include a Nazi war criminal who stood to gain the most from her death.
Nowhere Man: US crime drama. The investigation into the murder of a district attorney takes a sudden twist when police learn that the man was an impostor.
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Everyone Loves Raimondo's: Drama series about law enforcement. The detectives investigate the murder of a Hollywood producer whose death could be mob-related.
Swan Song: US crime drama series. The NCIS team chase every possible lead when the latest victim of the Port-to-Port killer turns out to be someone with personal ties to the team.
When the Port-to-Port killer is finally revealed, the entire NCIS team find themselves in grave danger.
Gibbs and the team have to find answers regarding Tony's assignment when an NCIS agent is found dead.
Erin disagrees with a psychiatric consultant's diagnosis of a nanny accused of abuse, Eddie confronts her boss and a woman claims she heard someone plotting a murder.
After a woman's body is found at a men's-only club, Danny and Baez investigate whether it was an accident. Frank learns of an illicit affair involving the chief of Internal Affairs.
Carisi and Rollins work together on an important arraignment. Benson tries to make Noah's Christmas wish come true when a case falls in her lap.
When Benson becomes the target of a ruthless gang leader, Capt. Duarte takes the case; Lt. Dixon offers to translate when a deaf student is raped.
Garland asks Benson to reopen a missing persons case that he worked as a rookie officer. A victim in one of Carisi's recent cases is arrested.
When a student's school reports a girl missing, the squad must track down a trusted family friend for answers. Benson gets a Mother's Day surprise.
Logan and Wheeler probe the death of a former child star. The actor was killed after his scheme to sell pirate DVDs incurred the wrath of the Albanian mob.
A traffic stop turns dangerous when a driver takes off with a deputy halfway inside the vehicle. Recent changes in the law and a forthright attitude help a man avoid jail time.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Ideal World Shopping - For All Your Shopping Needs
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Ships in the Night: US crime drama series. The NCIS team partners the Coast Guard Investigative Service when they investigate the murder of a marine on a dinner boat cruise.
Recruited: US crime drama series. When a recruitment session of a petty officer results in murder, the NCIS team sets out to find the culprit by teaming up with Ducky's predecessor.
Freedom: US crime drama series. The NCIS team has to locate both the family and the murderer when a Marine is found beaten to death in his own backyard.
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Floater: Police drama series. Briscoe and Green investigate a body in the river, leading to a corruption scandal involving lawyers and a judge.
Embedded: Police drama series. When a reporter embedded in Iraq reveals too much about his unit's position and is shot on returning to New York, suspicion falls on the army.
Vendetta: Drama series about law enforcement. When a baseball fan is stabbed to death in a bar, Briscoe and Green suspect the killing might be linked to the team he supports.
Gaijin: Drama series about law enforcement in New York. When a Japanese tourist is killed, her husband does not seem to reveal all he knows.
Caviar Emptor: Drama series about law enforcement in New York. An Iranian businessman is murdered the day after his wedding to a much younger woman.
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
C.O.D: Powerful American drama about the investigation and prosecution of crime. A man is found dead...and his wife has recently bought a gun.
The NCIS team investigate the death of a young marine who arrived at his homecoming party with a stab wound.
There is a surprise in store for the NCIS team when the investigation into the murder of a Navy lieutenant leads them to McGee's grandmother.
When a contract killer murders a Navy lieutenant commander, the NCIS team has to find out the motive behind it.
As Reese and Shaw race to catch up with Finch, he infiltrates a maximum-security government facility in a desperate mission that could mean the end of the war with Samaritan.
Finch, Reese, Fusco and Shaw embark on one last mission to prevent Samaritan from destroying The Machine and cementing its hold over mankind.
While Benson tries to help the gang member who attacked her, Duarte reveals a shocking piece of evidence in the case. Fin is tasked with hiring new detectives for the Bronx SVU.
As Benson and Carisi put a vengeful crime boss on trial, Fin tries to help a woman who was drugged and left for dead; Velasco takes drastic action to get information from a witness.
